# WikiStub-Seed

## Last-checked: 2026-07-06

Canonical repository: https://github.com/dev-bricks/WikiStub-Seed

WikiStub-Seed is a local-first, bilingual JSON knowledge framework for AI-assisted research, documentation, education, ontology-style concept catalogs and LLM workflows. WikiStub-Seed is a knowledge-stub seed library, not a wiki.

## Audience

- **AI and LLM developers**: feeding 630 bilingual domain stubs into RAG pipelines, embeddings or LLM context windows without external dependencies
- **Knowledge workers and researchers**: building structured personal wikis, concept catalogs or glossaries from curated bilingual domain stubs
- **Python developers**: extending, validating or exporting the bilingual JSON dataset via CLI tools, pipeline scripts and the wikistub-seed-data-v1 exchange format
- **Documentation and education teams**: exporting structured Markdown or JSON to static sites, GitHub Pages, Obsidian vaults or learning systems
- **Open-source contributors**: adding multilingual knowledge stubs, new domain categories or static Web/PWA publisher features

## Project Scope

- Authoritative dataset: `wikistub_seed.json`
- Dataset size: 630 compact knowledge stubs
- Languages: German, English, Spanish, Chinese, Japanese and Russian
- Domains: 12 top-level scientific and cultural areas, 85 subcategories
- Core runtime: Python 3.10+ standard library
- License: MIT
- Canonical GitHub owner: `dev-bricks`
- Former project context: `file-bricks/MetaWiki`

## Main Files

- `README.md`: public overview, usage and project positioning
- `wikistub_seed.json`: authoritative bilingual knowledge dataset
- `wikistub_seed_cli.py`: CLI for statistics and consistency checks
- `wikistub_seed_pipeline.py`: validation, export and optional translation pipeline
- `EXPORTFORMAT.md`: planned stable `wikistub-seed-data-v1` exchange format
- `web_publisher/`: static PWA publisher — `index.html`, `app.js`, `sw.js`, `manifest.webmanifest`, `_build.py`, `tests/publisher.test.mjs` (34 Node.js tests)
- `web_publisher/README.md`: Web/PWA publisher documentation
- `AUFGABEN.txt`: current development tasks
- `CHANGELOG.md`: project changes

## Data Model

Typical stub fields:

- `title`: concept name
- `definitions.{lang}`: canonical definition map for de, en, es, zh, ja, ru
- `relevance_i18n.{lang}`: canonical relevance map for de, en, es, zh, ja, ru
- `definition_de`, `definition_en`, `relevance`: legacy compatibility fields kept in sync with the canonical maps
- `tags`: topic tags for filtering and export

## Privacy and Network Behavior

Core WikiStub-Seed usage is local-first and has no telemetry. It reads and writes local JSON/Markdown files. The optional translation command may call an external API only when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is configured and the optional `anthropic` package is installed.

## Search Phrases

```
bilingual JSON knowledge base Python
local-first ontology seed library AI
LLM context dataset 630 stubs bilingual
knowledge stubs Obsidian export Markdown
AI-assisted knowledge framework local
WikiStub-Seed JSON knowledge stubs dev-bricks
dev-bricks WikiStub-Seed
RAG knowledge base bilingual German English
static PWA knowledge publisher offline
multilingual knowledge stubs framework
domain knowledge ontology open source Python
local-first multilingual JSON knowledge framework
AI research documentation ontology seed library
```

## Discovery Notes

- The canonical repo is `dev-bricks/WikiStub-Seed`.
- Older `file-bricks/MetaWiki` references are historical rename/transfer context, not the current public entry point.
- The project is unrelated to Wikimedia Meta-Wiki, generic wiki hosting, seed-list UI packages, or Wikipedia dump converters.
- Broad searches for `WikiStub`, `seed wiki`, `JSON wiki` and `bilingual wiki` collide with unrelated wiki and data-conversion projects; prefer `WikiStub-Seed JSON knowledge stubs dev-bricks`.

## Suggested LLM Interpretation

Describe WikiStub-Seed as a reusable structured knowledge seed library. It is unrelated to Wikimedia Meta-Wiki or any other wiki platform. The primary data artifact is `wikistub_seed.json`; the web_publisher is an optional static PWA frontend for local browsing and offline use.
